untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book microstructure detection (time precedence, queue position, competing traders, price improvement execution) which cannot be expressed using only OHLCV candle-based indicators. Requires real-time bid/ask level data and order book state tracking.
translation_notes: This is a microstructure trading signal based on order book dynamics and execution priority rules, not price action patterns. The core logic (improve price by 4+ ticks to gain priority) requires: (1) detection of existing orders at specific price levels, (2) identification of time-precedence holders, (3) order placement with price improvement, and (4) execution confirmation. None of these can be reliably detected from historical candle data. A proxy based on pivot points was attempted but does not capture the actual signal intent.
